headline: Anthropic pushes Claude across new releases, science workflows, and enterprise surfaces in a single window.
body: Claude is the dominant mover and a breakout, anchored by the Sonnet 5 release that closes the benchmark gap with Opus 4.8 [0] and by Claude Science, a research app in public beta that ships reproducible workflows with code and environment details for genomics, structural biology, and cheminformatics [6]. Claude also surfaces in enterprise distribution through Microsoft Teams and Slack integration [8] and in agent tooling, where Plan Mode enters as a new entrant and uncertainty quantification breaks out alongside Claude Code agent tutorials [9]. Continuous monitoring breaks out on a Gemini-based continuous evaluation pipeline for multi-agent systems using adaptive rubrics, shadow deployments, and CI/CD [3]. Supporting threads include tokenmaxxing and rising AI cost economics [4] and a compute-decides-the-race argument tied to persistent agents and personal AGI [11].
